allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const app = require\('./server'\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { process.exit\(0\); }, 1000\);")

Bash(python -c "import app; app.init_db\(\); print\('DB init OK'\); c = app.db\(\); count = c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM courses'\).fetchone\(\)[0]; print\(f'Courses loaded: {count}'\); c.close\(\)")
